behaviors_covered: RequestStatus lifecycle ordering and is_finished threshold
Request derived properties: num_new_tokens, num_tokens, is_prefill
FCFSRequestQueue: add/pop/peek/prepend/remove + bulk remove identity rule
SimpleKVCacheManager: block rounding (exact, partial, single-token), OOM None return, allocate-does-not-attach contract, free returns blocks and clears request.block_ids
Scheduler: empty schedule returns empty SchedulerOutput, total_num_scheduled_tokens sums
Arrival-order admission: FCFS, max_num_running_reqs cap, token-budget cap

Step-loop progress: single-request completion, chunked prefill splits 80-tok prompt at 32-budget into 32+32+16, chunked-prefill OFF blocks Phase 2 admission instead of letting later request jump ahead, decode advances 1 tok/step, long_prefill_token_threshold caps chunk size

Preemption (W02 honored: both fit initially, then OOM): pop-tail FCFS rule, post-preempt invariants (PREEMPTED status, num_computed=0, blocks freed, num_preemptions++, prepended to waiting), Phase 2 skip when preemption happened (D4/K09), preempted requests eventually resume and finish
Batch shape: token budget never overshot, len(running) bounded, per-request tokens <= num_new_tokens, running and waiting are disjoint sets
Integration: all blocks reclaimed on drain, FINISHED_LENGTH_CAPPED status set, demo workload (400/64/16 prompts) terminates with 200/200 blocks reclaimed in 10-30 steps
Bubble simulator: static formula = longest_prompt + longest_output, continuous beats static on skewed workload by >5x, empty workload returns 0

fidelity_findings.title: SchedulerOutput.finished_req_ids is empty in our impl
fidelity_findings.summary: vLLM populates finished_req_ids across step boundaries (the model runner uses it to drop KV between steps). Our merged update_after_step clears self.finished_req_ids in the same call, so the next schedule()'s output sees an empty set. Documented in test_finished_req_ids_field_is_simplified.
fidelity_findings.ch04_impact: None — Ch04 has no model runner; pedagogical scope. Authoritative finish check is request.is_finished().
fidelity_findings.future_chapter_impact: If a chapter wires a real runner that consumes finished_req_ids, this needs to flip to vLLM-style cross-step carry (clear at start of schedule(), not end of update_after_step).

wisdom_applied: W02 (preemption tests): all preempt tests use blocks=2 with two 16-tok prompts that EACH need 1 block — both fit initially, then decode growth triggers OOM and preempts the FCFS tail.
knowledge_applied: K02 (caller-pop contract): test_preempt_pops_tail_under_fcfs verifies the running.pop() / _preempt_request handshake.
K06 (FCFS tail-preempt): test confirms the request added LAST is preempted first.
K09 (Phase 2 skip on preempt): test_skip_phase2_when_preemption_happened verifies new waiters do NOT admit on the same step.
K11 (Phase 1 continue vs break): not directly tested (no num_new=0 scenario in current suite); implicit via TestStepLoopProgress.
